title: tanarius rugosus
intro: Tanarius rugosus, also known as Tanacetum rugosum, is a type of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant's leaves and flowers have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Tanarius rugosus are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to stimulate digestion and reduce menstrual cramps. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat various ailments, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
